commands.check-6: git diff --name-only -- install.sh deploy nginx docker-compose.yml

scenarios.scenario-1: Shared Matrix tokens style user and admin shells without breaking compact mobile workflows.
scenarios.scenario-2: Scanlines, flicker, and glitch accents are visible but do not reduce readability of forms, tables, proxy cards, tariffs, or incident controls.
scenarios.scenario-3: Mobile viewports have no document-level horizontal scroll and no text overlap.
scenarios.scenario-4: Long emails, proxy hostnames, secrets, config labels, tariff prices, and admin row actions must wrap or truncate intentionally inside stable containers.
scenarios.scenario-5: Reduced-motion mode must disable transform-heavy and flicker-heavy effects while preserving a recognizable Matrix style.

visual-checks.check-3: No status badge, button, table, chart, proxy secret, or tariff text overlap.
visual-checks.check-4: Visible focus state remains clear over Matrix background.

redaction.rule-1: Visual smoke must not print real tokens, proxy secrets, tg links, VPN config contents, admin tokens, or raw user IP history.
redaction.rule-2: Screenshot paths may be logged; screenshot binary data must not be embedded in logs.

acceptance.target-2: Phase-52/53/54 smoke scripts pass when their implementation phases execute.
acceptance.target-3: CSS remains mobile-safe, compact, readable, and not one-note despite the Matrix theme.
